description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched, dark gray hip roof and a light-colored exterior, likely finished in stucco or painted siding. The structure features a prominent front entrance with a small covered porch, flanked by a driveway and a walkway leading to the main door. Several windows are distributed along the front and sides, providing natural light to the interior, with some grouped and others spaced apart. The property includes a driveway that extends to a garage or carport area, and there is visible landscaping with a tree and shrubbery near the entrance. The building sits adjacent to a wide street, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood context. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on accessibility and single-level living.
description: A single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light exterior, front porch, driveway, and landscaped entry, set beside a wide street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway leading to the garage or carport and the side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the street.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, side landscaping, and garage access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows on front and sides
